seoTitle: Obum Obum vs Ocean View — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Obum Obum and Ocean View. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Obum Obum vs Ocean View: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Obum Obum and Ocean View.
heading: Obum Obum vs Ocean View — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Obum Obum, Queensland and Ocean View, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Obum Obum has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Ocean View (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Obum Obum or Ocean View safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Obum Obum has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Ocean View scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Obum Obum scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Ocean View scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Obum Obum or Ocean View?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Obum Obum has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
